arts.ttl: Jack Grealish Named 'Unbelievable' Star as Toughest Opponent of his Career
arts.sum: Jack Grealish named Manchester City and England team-mate Kyle Walker as the toughest opponent he's ever faced.

arts.ttl: We were cast aside by Manchester United - so now we're helping Man City's global drive for trophies
arts.sum: Manchester United pair are now trying to help establish Girona as a competitive force in Spain and European regulars

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi's private view on Man Utd and why he always preferred them to Man City
arts.sum: Lionel Messi never graced the Premier League with his presence, but if he did, then it's likely Manchester United would have been his destination of choice

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Everton - Premier League
arts.sum: Man City's predicted lineup for their Premier League clash with Everton on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi was 'charmed by Man Utd' for one reason Man City couldn't match
arts.sum: Lionel Messi was frequently linked with a move to Manchester City, but the Barcelona legend seemingly had more of a soft spot for Manchester United

arts.ttl: 'They all had snoods and gloves on' - Everton hero on Man City triumphs and ending wretched record

arts.ttl: Man City are changing plenty in pursuit of success - but there is one untried option left

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes Manchester City players sleep at training ground on Christmas night
arts.sum: Manchester City host Everton on Boxing Day amid a run of just one win in their last 12 matches in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Man City stars are forced to SLEEP at training ground overnight by Pep Guardiola ahead of Everton clash on Boxing Day
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola revealed that his charges will be dragged away from their family homes and insisted he hopes they embrace the measure with open arms.

arts.ttl: I've been told new Everton owner Dan Friedkin 'thinks big, fights hard and loves to win'
arts.sum: In an exclusive interview for Christmas Day, Chris Beesley speaks about Everton's new owner Dan Friedkin to fellow Houston business high-flier and Blues superfan Dr David France
